Name: Null Games
Description:
Null is a developer-friendly publisher of indie games for PC, Mac, and consoles.

We're part of a new wave of indie game publishers that put developers first. Our games treat players with respect, and our publishing agreement has some of the most developer-friendly terms there are. We partner with developers who share our vision, and, in exchange, we share their risk.

Many of us grew up exploring amazing digital worlds. But as we got older, we learned that the games industry isn't always fun. The creative people directly responsible for making great games are often treated the worst. In the world of indie games, the publishers have all the power and they know it. Contracts are often one-sided, as is the risk.

Description:
During a period of isolation in a pandemic, we got the idea to gather young people and make their everyday lives brighter by including what most people miss, football! We gathered and started Proclubs.no to create a platform where Norwegian gamers can compete against each other in engaging tournaments.

Pro Club is a special mode in FIFA that was integrated in 2011, and over the years it became more and more popular as you can create an online persona called "Virtual Pro" and play like him and earn achievements to increase your "virtual pro" statistics.

The basic idea of "Pro Club" goes back to the basics of football: 11 players against 11. Team spirit, tactics and communication are the keys to success!

Name: 45Days Studio

THE STUDIO
45 Days Studio is defined by velocity and vision. We are a lean, talented team of developers and creators united by a single, ambitious challenge: rapidly developing and launching new, immersive entertainment. Our process is built on an ambitious 45-day cycle, allowing us to build for millions of players on Roblox and mobile with agility. We are laser-focused on our players and building a community that is ready for the next drop.

OUR VISION 
We believe games are parallel universes. They can be vast, endless worlds, or they can be intense, immediate experiences. We choose to build universes that are instantly engaging, defined by rapid iteration, and that explore new concepts on an ambitious timeline. Our vision is to create a constantly expanding library of worlds, and we challenge our players to be ready for what each new 45-day cycle brings.

Name: Hoard
Description:
Hoard is a platform that aims to disrupt the video game industry by enabling true ownership of virtual items and downloadable content using blockchain technology.

In 2017, sales of virtual goods raked in more than USD$80 billion of the gaming industry’s total revenue of $103 billion (IDG Consulting, March 2017 Report). The top five grossing games that year were free-to-play, a model which generates income from sales of in-game content.

Yet, gamers do not truly own the content that they have purchased. Publishers place strict qualifications on what users can do with these items with EULAs (End User License Agreements) and they have the power to change the terms of service, freeze players accounts or even shut the whole marketplace down.

The Hoard platform will facilitate 3 main things:
1) True ownership of virtual content for gamers
2) A new model of game financing for developers
3) Development of a virtual goods marketplace and new opportunities for ‘virtual employment’

Name: Bob Earl Racing
Description: The Virtual Racing Chassis is designed to simulate my driving position in racecar's I drove for 25 years. I tried all of the racing game seats on the market using common GT seats and found they might work great in a car but not sitting still playing a game. They felt like sitting in, well...... a chair. Most were too upright and firm, like you are sitting on the seat instead of in it. Every Race Car I ever drove from Formula, Prototype to Trans-Am or GT the driver is reclined and as low as possible to get a low center of Gravity. The VRC puts you in this realistic seating position for the perfect race simulator seat. Remembering that every time I was hired to drive a new race car the first thing we did was make a seat for me, why not make a racing game cockpit to fit almost everyone? With Huffaker Engineering I decided to design my own Sim Pod and the resulting VRC is very comfortable, realistic, with the wheel and pedals where they belong. Name: MetaZero
Description:
Gaming has always been more than just a pastime; it's a thriving culture that brings together millions worldwide. Yet, the true value of gaming assets – like CS:GO skins, unique in-game items and currencies – remain bounded by isolated traditional gaming markets. MetaZero recognizes this untapped potential and is committed to changing the game.

MetaZero is a Synthetic Liquidity Layer Protocol for Omnichain Tokenization of Gaming Real World Assets (RWAs).

MetaZero is poised to transform gaming assets from mere gaming collectibles to investment vehicles. Our mission is to unlock the economic potential of these gaming assets, making them accessible and tradable as Synthetic RWA Cross-chain (Omnichain) tokens on the blockchain. The estimated TAM (Total Addressable Market) of gaming skins is valued over $50 billion and the market cap of just the CS2 gaming assets exceeds $3.5 billion. MetaZero is strategically positioning itself to capitalize on this and other opportunities.

With a mix of backgrounds ranging from finance-, bank-, defense- and gaming industry to home coders, mod makers, WoW addicts and pure geeks we have managed to create what can best be described as a structured yet extremely creative work environment.

Мы занимаемся организацией онлайн и офлайн турниров по популярным дисциплинам (CS2, Dota 2) и киберспортивных мероприятий. 
В 2023 году мы открыли Pavaga Arena (Минск, Машерова, 11) - одну из лучших киберспортивных площадок страны, где регулярно проводим массовые турниры среди non-профи, а также корпоративные турниры под ключ для сотрудников различных организаций. 
Мы объединяем глубокую киберспортивную экспертизу, многолетний опыт организации турниров и мероприятий, креативный подход, а также навык работы с крупными брендами.

ReadySetGo is a gaming marketplace that aims to be a effective alternative to the existing game distribution giants by providing a environment with no content screening(except for harmful content) and minimal value extraction.
